lines.speaker: 'Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Yeah, it cost a fair bit.

lines.speaker: 'Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Well, I had to 'alch' a fair few belongings of my fellow alchemists to afford it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I bet they love you for that.

lines.speaker: 'Currency' The Alchemist
lines.text: Everyone loves someone that can create money.
